characters.description: A tower climber held in a stone cell by a silver-eyed captor of overwhelming power. Max masks the extent of his abilities, stays calm under pressure, and waits for an opening while worrying about Tanila and the companions from whom he has been separated.
characters.name: Max

characters.description: The sentient ability bound within Max. It speaks to him internally, assesses magical dangers, and counsels patience while he is imprisoned. The entity shares his concern for Tanila and the companions from whom Max has been separated.
characters.name: Consume

characters.description: The immensely powerful man holding Max behind a magical barrier. He tries to frighten and provoke his prisoner, but Max suspects that fear lies beneath his anger. His strength makes a direct escape attempt too dangerous.
characters.name: Silver-eyed captor

characters.description: A lizard woman freed by Max from slavers in a mountain cave. She accepts the name Amy and agrees to guide him toward a city where someone may be able to remove his collar, giving him vital local knowledge during the hunt.
characters.name: Amy

characters.description: Amy's blind mother, who is wary when her daughter arrives at their glass settlement with Max, an unfamiliar smooth-skinned outsider.
characters.name: Amy's mother

characters.description: The powerful insect who runs the third-ring arena and negotiates a contract giving Max a share of his winnings, with improved terms for victories and a champion defeat.
characters.name: Third-ring arena proprietor

characters.description: The arena identity Max adopts when he begins fighting for tokens. He presents Ifrit as a fire-wielding combatant while concealing his wider range of powers and his real reason for trying to advance through the city.
characters.name: Ifrit

characters.description: A local craftsperson whom Max approaches for a strong but unadorned staff. The weaponsmith is willing to consider the unusual commission, opening a possible route to equipment suited to Max's needs.
characters.name: Kimono-mimi weaponsmith

characters.description: Max's bonded partner and a member of his tower party. Two months after his disappearance, she leads the group's continued climb and trusts the unchanged sign of their bond as evidence that he is still alive.
characters.name: Tanila

characters.description: A returning member of Max's tower party who continues climbing while Max is missing. After the group clears the floor-45 boss, Fowl supports Tanila's conviction that their absent companion remains alive.
characters.name: Fowl

characters.description: A returning member of Max's tower party who helps defeat the floor-45 boss during his absence. Batrire stands with Tanila and the others as they continue the climb without abandoning hope of finding him.
characters.name: Batrire

characters.description: One of the tower climbers traveling with Tanila's group during Max's unexplained absence. Cordelia takes part in their successful floor-45 battle as the party presses onward without him.
characters.name: Cordelia

characters.description: An ally fighting alongside Tanila, Fowl, Batrire, and Cordelia while Max is missing. Dexic helps the group defeat the floor-45 boss and remains with them as they continue their tower ascent.
characters.name: Dexic

characters.description: A promoter who provides lodging when Max and Amy reach a wealthier ring of the city. He also agrees to search for suitable premises for the weaponsmith.
characters.name: City promoter

characters.description: The golden-scaled ruler who controls the city and its arena system. She intervenes when arena protections are violated, recognizes that Max was brought to her world by the hunter, and postpones a private discussion with him.
characters.name: Dragonkin ruler

characters.description: A formidable Vorpal hunter who becomes Ifrit's representative under a profit-sharing agreement. Despite his rabbit-like appearance, he makes clear that he can defend the new arrangement and supplies practical support as Max advances.
characters.name: Jazz Jack

characters.description: The private name Max gives Consume, the sentient ability within him. Their bond has developed through danger and Max's choices, and the name marks a more personal understanding between them that Max does not extend to anyone else.
characters.name: Bob

characters.description: A red-skinned extraplanar fighter called through Max's demonic summoning. It recognizes Max and says his blood altered it, then accepts a tightly limited bargain to kill seven arena opponents before the contract expires.
characters.name: Summoned demon

characters.description: A lionkin arena champion matched against Ifrit. Shamina enters heavily armed with sword, shield, and armor, presenting a physically imposing challenge as Max reaches a more dangerous level of competition.
characters.name: Shamina

characters.description: A servant of the city ruler who takes Max alone to her portal-filled residence. The attendant rejects being reduced to a simple elf label.
characters.name: Dark elf attendant

characters.description: An experienced craftswoman from another world who recognizes the unusual nature of Max's bonded staff. She privately agrees to exchange materials and instruction for access to his uncommon crafting knowledge.
characters.name: Dwarven weaponsmith

characters.description: The unidentified traveler whom the dragonkin ruler says paid her to remove Max. This disclosure reveals that his imprisonment in the local tower is part of a deliberate arrangement extending beyond the ruler herself.
characters.name: Other world traveler

characters.description: A collared dragon imprisoned beyond the tower horde. He tells Max that the dragonkin ruler compels him to guard the exit and kill anyone who survives long enough to reach him.
characters.name: Silver dragon

characters.description: A Golden Axe leader connected to Max's climbing group. He is part of the established support structure surrounding the tower campaign before Max's disappearance in this volume.
characters.name: Everett

characters.description: A Golden Axe trainer and operational leader associated with Max and his fellow tower climbers. His role in their established organization predates the events of this volume.
characters.name: Tom
